justification: The diff attempts a Spring Boot 2.3 -> 3.3 migration but fails to fully migrate Spring Security (retains deprecated `WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter` with only comments suggesting manual migration) and leaves `SpringFoxSwaggerConfig` partially broken (removes `@EnableSwagger2` and `Docket` bean but keeps the class name and imports). It also sets `java.version` to 17 instead of 21, and introduces spurious churn by replacing `@RequestMapping` with specific annotations while leaving `@GetMapping` and `@RequestMapping` coexisting in `RegisterController`.
